entries.name: firestoreField
entries.description:
Creates a Firestore field mapping configuration.

This is the low-level building block that all other field converters (e.g., {@link firestoreString},
{@link firestoreDate}) delegate to. It generates `from`/`to` mapping functions that handle defaults
and conversions in both directions.

Use the higher-level field converters for common types; use this directly only when you need a
custom conversion not covered by the built-in converters.

params.name: config
params.description: - Configuration for the Firestore field.

entries.returns: A configured mapping between model and Firestore data.

entries.name: FIRESTORE_PASSTHROUGH_FIELD
entries.returns: ModelFieldMapFunctionsWithDefaultsConfig<V, Maybe<D>>

entries.name: firestorePassThroughField
entries.description:
Creates a pass-through field mapping configuration that doesn't transform the data.

This is useful when the model field and Firestore field are the same type and
no transformation is needed in either direction.
entries.returns: A field mapping configuration that passes values through unchanged.

entries.name: firestoreString
entries.description:
Creates a field mapping configuration for Firestore string fields.

Defaults to empty string `''` when the field is missing. Supports optional string
transformation (e.g., lowercase, trim) applied on both read and write.

params.name: config
params.description: - Configuration for the string field.

entries.returns: A field mapping configuration for string values.

entries.name: optionalFirestoreString
entries.description: Creates a field mapping configuration for optional Firestore string fields.

params.name: config
params.description: - Configuration for the optional string field.

entries.returns: A field mapping configuration for optional string values.

entries.name: firestoreEnum
entries.description: Creates a field mapping configuration for Firestore enum fields.

params.name: config
params.description: - Configuration for the enum field.

entries.returns: A field mapping configuration for enum values.

entries.name: optionalFirestoreEnum
entries.description: Creates a field mapping configuration for optional Firestore enum fields.

params.name: config
params.description: - Configuration for the optional enum field.

entries.returns: A field mapping configuration for optional enum values.

entries.name: firestoreUID
entries.description: Creates a field mapping configuration for Firestore UID fields.
entries.returns: A field mapping configuration for Firebase Auth user IDs.

entries.name: optionalFirestoreUID
entries.description: Creates a field mapping configuration for optional Firestore UID fields.
entries.returns: A field mapping configuration for optional Firebase Auth user IDs.

entries.name: firestoreModelKeyString
entries.description: Pre-built field mapping for Firestore model key strings. Defaults to empty string.
entries.returns: ModelFieldMapFunctionsWithDefaultsConfig<V, Maybe<D>>

entries.name: firestoreModelIdString
entries.description: Pre-built field mapping for Firestore model ID strings. Defaults to empty string.
entries.returns: ModelFieldMapFunctionsWithDefaultsConfig<V, Maybe<D>>

entries.name: firestoreDate
entries.description:
Creates a field mapping configuration for Firestore date fields.

Handles conversion between JavaScript Date objects and ISO8601 strings stored in Firestore.
Defaults to `new Date()` when the field is missing. Use `saveDefaultAsNow` to automatically
store the current timestamp when a new document is created.

params.name: config
params.description: - Configuration for the date field.

entries.returns: A field mapping configuration for Date values.

entries.name: optionalFirestoreDate
entries.description:
Creates a field mapping configuration for optional Firestore date fields.

Handles conversion between JavaScript Date objects and ISO8601 strings stored in Firestore.

params.name: config
params.description: - Configuration for the optional date field.

entries.returns: A field mapping configuration for optional Date values.

entries.name: firestoreDateNumber
entries.description:
Creates a field mapping configuration for Firestore date fields stored as numbers.

Handles conversion between JavaScript Date objects and numeric representations
using the provided `fromDate`/`toDate` conversion functions.

params.name: config
params.description: - Configuration including custom Date-to-number conversion functions.

entries.returns: A field mapping configuration for Date values stored as numbers.

entries.name: optionalFirestoreDateNumber
entries.description: Creates a field mapping configuration for optional Firestore date field that is stored as a number.

params.name: config
params.description: - Configuration for the optional date field.

entries.returns: A field mapping configuration for optional Date values.

entries.name: firestoreBoolean
entries.description: Creates a field mapping configuration for Firestore boolean fields.

params.name: config
params.description: - Configuration for the boolean field.

entries.returns: A field mapping configuration for boolean values.

entries.name: optionalFirestoreBoolean
entries.description: Creates a field mapping configuration for optional Firestore boolean fields.

params.name: config
params.description: - Configuration for the optional boolean field.

entries.returns: A field mapping configuration for optional boolean values.

entries.name: firestoreNumber
entries.description: Creates a field mapping configuration for Firestore number fields.

params.name: config
params.description: - Configuration for the number field.

entries.returns: A field mapping configuration for number values.

entries.name: optionalFirestoreNumber
entries.description: Creates a field mapping configuration for optional Firestore number fields.

params.name: config
params.description: - Configuration for the optional number field.

entries.returns: A field mapping configuration for optional number values.

entries.name: firestoreArray
entries.description:
Creates a field mapping configuration for Firestore array fields.

Defaults to an empty array when the field is missing. Supports optional sorting
via `sortWith` which is applied on both read and write.

params.name: config
params.description: - Configuration for the array field.

entries.returns: A field mapping configuration for array values.

entries.name: optionalFirestoreArray
entries.description:
Creates a field mapping configuration for optional Firestore array fields.

Supports unique filtering and conditional storage based on array content.

params.name: config
params.description: - Configuration for the optional array field.

entries.returns: A field mapping configuration for optional array values.

entries.name: firestoreEnumArray
entries.description: Creates a field mapping configuration for Firestore array fields of unique enum values.

params.name: config
params.description: - Configuration for the enum array field.

entries.returns: A field mapping configuration for enum array values.

entries.name: firestoreModelKeyArrayField
entries.description: Pre-built field mapping for arrays of unique Firestore model key strings.
entries.returns: ModelFieldMapFunctionsWithDefaultsConfig<V, Maybe<D>>

entries.name: firestoreModelIdArrayField
entries.description:
Pre-built field mapping for arrays of unique Firestore model ID strings.
Alias for {@link firestoreModelKeyArrayField}.
entries.returns: ModelFieldMapFunctionsWithDefaultsConfig<V, Maybe<D>>

entries.name: firestoreMap
entries.description:
Creates a field mapping configuration for Firestore map-type (key-value object) fields.

By default, removes all null/undefined keys from the object before saving to Firestore.
Defaults to an empty object `{}` when the field is missing.

params.name: config
params.description: - Configuration for the map field.

entries.returns: A field mapping configuration for map values.

entries.name: firestoreArrayMap
entries.description:
Creates a field mapping configuration for Firestore map fields where each value is an array.

Defaults to filtering empty arrays and null/undefined elements from each array before saving.

params.name: config
params.description: - Configuration for the array map field.

entries.returns: A field mapping configuration for map values with array entries.

entries.name: firestoreObjectArray
entries.description:
Creates a field mapping configuration for Firestore arrays of complex objects.

Each element in the array is converted using its own set of field converters (via `objectField`
or `firestoreField`), enabling type-safe conversion of embedded document arrays.
Supports optional unique filtering and sorting.

On write, null/undefined values are filtered from each object to match Firestore semantics.

params.name: config
params.description: - Configuration including element conversions and optional filtering/sorting.

entries.returns: A field mapping configuration for object array values.

entries.name: firestoreSubObject
entries.description:
Creates a field mapping configuration for nested Firestore object fields.

Maps a nested object using its own set of field converters, enabling recursive type-safe
conversion of embedded documents. The `objectField` defines the conversion rules for
the nested object's fields using the same converter patterns.

params.name: config
params.description: - Configuration including nested field conversions.

entries.returns: A field mapping configuration with both field config and map functions.

entries.name: firestoreLatLngString
entries.description:
Creates a field mapping configuration for Firestore latitude/longitude string fields.

Stores lat/lng as a single string rather than a lat/lng object or value pair. This is preferred
because Firestore cannot efficiently sort/search lat and lng together, making indexing on separate
fields useless. As a single string field, it integrates with the {@link LatLngStringRef} interface
and can be mapped using `latLngDataPointFunction()`.

Applies validation and optional precision rounding on both read and write.

params.name: config
params.description: - Optional precision and default value configuration.

entries.returns: A field mapping configuration for LatLngString values.
